settings.text: We'd love to hear about your space. Every project starts with a conversation.

settings.title: Visit the Studio
settings.address: 218 NW Everett St, Suite 4, Portland, OR 97209

settings.title: Studio Hours
settings.text:
Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Saturday: By appointment
Sunday: Closed

settings.question: What should I prepare for our first meeting?
settings.answer: Bring photos of your space, any inspiration images you've saved (Pinterest boards are great), and a rough idea of your budget and timeline. We'll handle the rest — measuring, assessing, and creative direction are all part of the consultation.

settings.question: Is the initial consultation free?
settings.answer: Yes. Your first meeting — whether at our studio or your home — is complimentary and typically lasts about an hour. We'll discuss your vision, walk through the space, and outline next steps if it's a good fit.

settings.question: How far in advance should I book?
settings.answer: We recommend reaching out 2-3 months before your ideal start date. We take on a limited number of projects each quarter, and popular seasons (spring and fall) fill up quickly.

settings.question: Can we meet virtually?
settings.answer: Absolutely. For clients outside the Portland area or those who prefer it, we offer video consultations. The experience is the same — just bring your photos and inspiration to the call.
